text_block_list.text:
One day, I bring <chrname> to the
infirmary for a checkup.
Oh! A custo―I mean, a student! Hello!

Are you hurt? Sick? Stressed? Whatever it is, I
treat it all!

Well, considering you're at the academy
infirmary, I'd say that makes me your trusty
school nurse! Yup, just your average school
employee!

Ahaha! Guess there's no fooling you. I suppose I
should start by giving you my name.
Ahem! Allow me to introduce myself!

I am the (likely) savior of all Umamusume, the
(self-proclaimed) legendary acupuncturist with
the magic touch...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
The one and only Sasami Anshinzawa! See? No
worries! ☆

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: H-huh?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Gosh! You sure seem worried! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
No matter! No matter! We've made our
introductions, so lie down and let me put these
needles to work!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Kyaaah! Um... I d-don't think I can go through
with this. I'm sorry!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! No need to be scared! All I'm going to do
is slip these extraordinary needles precisely into
your chakra points.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Then voilà, presto! Something indescribable will
happen!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
And let me assure you, there's absolutely nothing
sketchy about this at all! It's never gone anything
less than perfectly!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: ...For my master.
choice_data_list: For your master?! What about for you?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Don't fret! This is my first time, so technically, I've
never failed a patient either!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
And it's not like I have no experience! I spent ten
years under a legendary master, fetching dri—I
mean, training!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: See? No worries! ☆
choice_data_list: (We need to get outta here, stat!)

text_block_list.text:
There's no way we're doing this. I take
<chrname> and head for the door,
when...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: W-wait! Where are you going?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
You're Meisho Doto, right?! The somewhat
clumsy girl doing her utmost best to change for
the better?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Have I heard of her? Of course I have! I'm a big
fan!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
That's precisely why I'm here! To give you my
support! Let me help you!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Just give me a chance! Pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... Wh-what should we do, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Please! Pretty please with a carrot on top! I'll even
let you choose which chakra I activate!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: I'm sure I won't mess up!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Well... pretty sure.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: I mean, it's on the sure side! That's good, right? Anyway, don't get hung up on the details!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Let's get to the good stuff! Which chakra should I activate? Do you want a boost to your abilities? Your health? Or maybe your charm?
I smell danger in the air, but I figure there might—and I emphasize might—be a chance of getting something special out of this treatment.
What should we do?
choice_data_list: This is too sketchy. Let's quit while we still can.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I see, I see. So you want me to activate the
strength chakra?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Then let's get started! Are you ready? There's no
going back after!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
All right, leave it to me! Time to locate that
chakra! Ollie, ollie, oxen free!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Now, just relaaax... See? No worries! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Aaand poke!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ughhh!
Puncture Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer! I...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I feel so energetic and filled with courage! I might
even manage to overcome all my flaws!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Gasp... You're kidding... It actually worked?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: No waaay! I can't believe it! I'm a total genius!

<chrname> is overflowing with so
much power she's almost unrecognizable!

We took a chance and it paid off! This is a great
leap toward achieving our goal!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Uugh... Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I can't go on—my body feels so heavy... There
was... no hope for me... in the end.

<chrname>'s condition deteriorates
rapidly.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: So... That's that, I guess...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, would you look at the time? I should get
going! Bye! ☆

I should've known better than to test our luck. I'm
not the one suffering, yet I'm full of regret.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I see, I see. So, you want me to activate the
winning chakra?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Then let's get started! Are you ready? There's no
going back after!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:

text_block_list.text: Gasp... You're kidding... It actually worked?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: No waaay! I can't believe it! I'm a total genius!

I can sense a huge improvement in
<chrname>'s skills!

We took a chance and it paid off! This is a great
leap toward achieving our goal!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Uugh... Trainer...

rapidly.

text_block_list.text: So... That's that, I guess...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:

going! Bye! ☆

I should've known better than to test our luck. I'm
not the one suffering, yet I'm full of regret.

text_block_list.text: Gasp... You're kidding... It actually worked?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: No waaay! I can't believe it! I'm a total genius!

<chrname>'s entire body is radiating a
healthy glow! She's the absolute picture of health!

We took a chance and it paid off! This is one
great leap toward achieving our goal!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Uugh... Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Gasp... You're kidding... It actually worked?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: No waaay! I can't believe it! I'm a total genius!

<chrname> is overflowing with charm!
She's bound to turn heads everywhere she goes!

We took a chance and it paid off! This is a great
leap toward achieving our goal!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Uugh... Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I can't go on—my body feels so heavy... There
was... no hope for me... in the end.

<chrname>'s condition deteriorates
rapidly.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: So... That's that, I guess...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, would you look at the time? I should get
going! Bye! ☆

I should've known better than to test our luck. I'm
not the one suffering, yet I'm full of regret.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Aw, c'mon! Don't be like that!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hey! You there! I hope you know trespassers will be prosecuted!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Gah! I've been found out!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Welp, I'm outta here! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hey! Stop right there!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh... She r-ran away...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
What was she doing here? Ohh, I was terrified,
but... we'll be okay now, right?

I'm curious who this Anshinzawa character really
is, but there's no use ruminating over it. Best to
forget about today and move on.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Had a change of heart, did you? No worries, it
happens!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead and tell me which chakra you want me
to activate, then!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well?! Don't leave us in suspense! Wait a
second... How long have I been here?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hey! You there! I hope you know trespassers will be prosecuted!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Gah! I've been found out!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Welp, I'm outta here! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hey! Stop right there!

The situation takes a sharp turn before I can
make a decision.

What was that all about? <chrname>
and I look at each other in bewilderment.
